errors.pageErrorDescription.en: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

tools.removeBlankPages.analyzingPages.en: Reading pages and computing information entropy...

tools.removeBlankPages.sensitivityHint.en: Higher sensitivity is more lenient, making pages with slight scanning noise/watermarks easily marked as blank. Recommended blank pages are greyed out with a red diagonal bar. Click cards directly to override: force keep or force delete.

tools.batchWatermarkRemover.uploadDescri.en: Drag & drop PDF here to physically purge background watermarks.

tools.smartDataRedactor.uploadDescriptio.en: Drag & drop PDF here to automatically scan & redact privacy data.

tools.bookmarksAutoGenerator.successMess.en: Bookmarks successfully injected into PDF Outline structure!

tools.batchBarcodeInjector.uploadDescrip.en: Drag & drop PDF here to batch stamp QR / Barcodes.

tools.signatureInkOptimizer.uploadDescri.en: Drag & drop signature photos to extract transparent PNG ink layer.

tools.deadLinkDebugger.uploadDescription.en: Drag & drop PDF here to probe interactive hyperlinks.

tools.interactiveTocGenerator.uploadDesc.en: Drag & drop PDF here to auto compile interactive Table of Contents.

tools.interactiveTocGenerator.successMes.en: Interactive TOC page & bidirectional anchors woven successfully!

tools.globalInvoiceParser.successMessage.en: Foreign invoice translated and local conversion ledger stamped successfully!

common.fileUploader.enterPasswordHelp.en: Please enter the password to unlock and load:

common.pdfDeskewAligner.uploadDescriptio.en: Utilizes Hough transform edge fitting to probe grid axis and losslessly deskew pages to perfect horizontal alignment.

common.pdfDeskewAligner.successMessage.en: Document scanned axes horizontally aligned successfully!

common.pdfDeskewAligner.gyroHelp.en: Set detection options on the right. Gyroscope probes are aligning pages horizontally.

common.pdfTwoColumnReflower.uploadDescri.en: Intelligently split the middle gutter and vertically flow left and right columns to comfortable single-column readable layouts.

common.pdfTwoColumnReflower.successMessa.en: Academic paper double-column flow successfully reflowed to single-column!

common.pdfPageResizerUniform.uploadDescr.en: Scale and center-align varied page sizes (like A3, Letter, custom invoices) to uniform target layout sheet dimensions.

common.pdfPageResizerUniform.successMess.en: Varied PDF sheets successfully unified to standard size!

common.pdfPageResizerUniform.uniformHelp.en: Various page shapes (A3, Letter, custom sheets) are scaled and aligned uniformly under the circular light beam.

common.pdfPageResizerUniform.modeFit.en: Adaptive Fit (Aspect ratio kept, padded margins)

common.pdfPageResizerUniform.modeFill.en: Aspect Fill (Aspect ratio kept, centered crop)

common.handwritingInkContrastBooster.upl.en: Applies local CLAHE histogram enhancement to bleach moldy shadows and sharply boost blue/black signatures and red stamp ink.

common.handwritingInkContrastBooster.suc.en: Handwritten stroke lines and red stamp contrast purified successfully!

common.handwritingInkContrastBooster.mag.en: Illuminated Contrast Lens (Drag to sweep paper mold)

common.handwritingInkContrastBooster.ble.en: (Drag the right slider to bleach backing paper)

common.pdfSpineBookbinder.uploadDescript.en: Input total pages and paper density (GSM) to model and calculate binding spine mm width and compile print crease layout.

common.pdfSpineBookbinder.successMessage.en: Spine binding thickness computed and fold-line envelope generated successfully!

common.pdfSpineBookbinder.magnifierTitle.en: 3D Book Binding Crease Model (Drag mouse to rotate)

common.pdfSignatureAnchorHelper.uploadDe.en: Click anywhere on the preview sheet to anchor interactive glowing sign-here tags and scrolling index guide bookmarks.

common.pdfSignatureAnchorHelper.successM.en: Interactive signature anchors and navigation pointers woven successfully!

common.pdfSignatureAnchorHelper.magnifie.en: Agreement Radar Anchor Deck (Click preview to place signatures)

common.pdfLosslessSlicer.uploadDescripti.en: Rewrites MediaBox viewport matrix. Physically slices local regions without rendering to blurry images, retaining clear vectors.

common.pdfLosslessSlicer.successMessage.en: High-resolution drawing local sliced out losslessly!

common.pdfLosslessSlicer.magnifierTitle.en: Laser Crop Matrix (Drag and scale visual crop borders)

common.pdfScratchpadCanvas.uploadDescrip.en: Stretches paper boundary losslessly to stitch 200pt grid, ruled notebook lines, or Cornell layout drafts alongside slide margins.

common.pdfScratchpadCanvas.successMessag.en: Draft grids stitched alongside page margins successfully!

common.pdfScratchpadCanvas.previewTitle.en: 3D Folded Scratchpad Preview (Click to toggle fold animation)

common.photoTilingPrepress.uploadDescrip.en: Arrange ID photo grids on standard 5"/6" photo paper print sheet with precision and dashed physical crop slicing marks.

common.photoTilingPrepress.successMessag.en: Passport photo matrix prepress and crop marks stamped successfully!

common.photoTilingPrepress.previewTitle.en: Wooden Pre-flight Card Desk (Magnetic Alignment Snaps)

common.globalInvoiceParser.uploadDescrip.en: Analyzes invoice amount and auto-calculates exchange rate locally, rendering a premium localized exchange-rate ledger card.

common.globalInvoiceParser.successMessag.en: Exchange rate ledger stamped on foreign invoice successfully!

common.globalInvoiceParser.convertRateAp.en: Converted original total {original} {currency} locally via exchange rate {rate}.

common.globalInvoiceParser.emptyStateDes.en: Extract currency info from the invoice in one click and render a premium localized exchange-rate card styled with glassmorphism locally.

common.globalInvoiceParser.customRatePla.en: e.g. 7.25 (Leave blank to use real-time rate)

common.passportIdComposer.uploadLabel.en: Upload ID Card / Passport Photos (Front + Back)

common.passportIdComposer.uploadDescript.en: Accepts PDFs or JPG/PNG image files. The system will align and compile them onto a standard A4 layout page.

common.passportIdComposer.successMessage.en: ID cards arranged onto standard A4 sheet successfully!

common.passportIdComposer.previewTitle.en: ID Layout Preview Deck (Magnetic snapping layout grids)

common.annotationExporter.uploadDescript.en: Automatically deserializes PDF markup streams, extracting fluorescent highlights and comment notes into structured summaries.

common.annotationExporter.successMessage.en: All highlights and commenter notes extracted successfully!

common.annotationExporter.emptyStateTitl.en: Wait for parse complete, notes will compile to standard layout.

common.batchWatermarkRemover.uploadDescr.en: Locates repeated background patterns and text markers, stripping watermark content streams with physical vector preservation.

common.batchWatermarkRemover.successMess.en: All matched watermark background layers purged successfully!

common.batchWatermarkRemover.emptyStateD.en: Identify Tj/TJ contents stream keywords and automatically clean repetitive backdrop layouts, keeping raw vector resolution.

common.smartDataRedactor.uploadDescripti.en: Employs regex matching. Automatically discovers emails, phone numbers, and IDs, placing solid black barriers to obscure data.

common.smartDataRedactor.successMessage.en: All sensitive privacy data masked and purged successfully!

common.smartDataRedactor.emptyStateDescr.en: Discover and obscure target sensitive categories, completely clearing corresponding glyph text streams from PDF.

common.bookmarksAutoGenerator.uploadDesc.en: Probes text weight and page height differences to intelligently parse chapter indexes, injecting outline structures into PDF Binary.

common.bookmarksAutoGenerator.successMes.en: Chapter bookmark outlines computed and injected successfully!

common.bookmarksAutoGenerator.emptyState.en: Inspects title font sizing and hierarchical tags like 'Chapter 1' to compile deep expandable bookmark navigation sidebars.

common.batchBarcodeInjector.uploadLabel.en: Upload Target PDF to Inject Barcode

common.batchBarcodeInjector.uploadDescri.en: Receives link items list or text assets, compiling QR codes / barcodes to overlay on specified page coordinates.

common.batchBarcodeInjector.successMessa.en: QR codes / barcodes batches injected successfully!

common.batchBarcodeInjector.gridLabel.en: Origin is at bottom-left corner (X: {xPos}pt, Y: {yPos}pt)

common.signatureInkOptimizer.uploadDescr.en: Applies chrominance extraction to strip dark paper shadow details and bleach mold background, keeping high-fidelity stamps.

common.signatureInkOptimizer.successMess.en: Signature and seal background purged successfully!

common.signatureInkOptimizer.emptyStateD.en: Slide purification factors to bleach grey sheet shadow pixels and emphasize high fidelity red stamps.

common.signatureInkOptimizer.optimizerTy.en: Restore red stamp wax seal contrast

common.deadLinkDebugger.uploadDescriptio.en: Traverses internal page structures to probe /URI Action triggers, executing live link checking and redirect overrides.

common.deadLinkDebugger.successMessage.en: Dead links diagnosed and overridden successfully!

common.deadLinkDebugger.idleText.en: Click the trigger button to scan global hyperlink nodes.

common.deadLinkDebugger.emptyStateDescri.en: Deep scan PDF URL redirections and list them in details to perform redirect overrides in one click.

common.interactiveTocGenerator.uploadLab.en: Upload PDF to Inject Interactive TOC

common.interactiveTocGenerator.uploadDes.en: Parses headings to format elegant front index sheet layouts, binding interactive GoTo anchor link triggers to headers.

common.interactiveTocGenerator.successMe.en: Interactive Table of Contents front page stitched successfully!

common.interactiveTocGenerator.emptyStat.en: Build elegant, linkable table of contents sheet while anchoring 'Back to TOC' jumping pointer guides on sheet margins.

common.interactiveTocGenerator.insertPag.en: Insertion Index Page Offset (0 for start)

common.aiPdfReflower.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop academic papers, two-column layouts, or text PDFs here. The system will automatically parse and reflow.

common.aiPdfReflower.optionsHelp.en: Adjust typography and layout styled on the 3D phone simulator.

common.certCryptor.enableDoubleKey.en: Enable Certificate Double-Key Encryption (256-bit Strong Lock)

common.certCryptor.clickToReposition.en: Click anywhere to reposition the wax seal

common.citationLinker.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop papers, articles, or reports. The system will auto-link markers (e.g. [1]) with references.

common.citationLinker.enableGoto.en: Enable page-jump 'GoTo' when DOI is absent

common.citationLinker.injectingMessage.en: Injecting active citation annotations into PDF catalog...

common.citationLinker.successDesc.en: Successfully injected active links and page-jump actions for {count} citations. Fully interactive in any PDF reader.

common.comparePdfs.progressExtractingOri.en: Analyzing and extracting Original PDF layout...

common.comparePdfs.progressExtractingMod.en: Analyzing and extracting Modified PDF layout...

common.comparePdfs.progressRunningDiff.en: Running CJK semantic alignment and paragraph diffing...

common.comparePdfs.errorDiffFailed.en: Algorithm exception occurred during semantic comparison.

common.comparePdfs.modifiedPdfDesc.en: Contains edits, additions, deletions, or structural shifts

common.comparePdfs.compareStats.en: Aligned {total} pages • {diff} pages contain semantic differences

common.comparePdfs.insertedPageDesc.en: This page was added in the modified document. The original version has no corresponding layout, automatically aligned.

common.comparePdfs.deletedPageDesc.en: This page was completely deleted in the modified document. Aligned with a blank filler to preserve subsequent page flows.

common.compress.sliderTooltip.en: Drag the slider to compare original vs optimized quality (Page 1)

common.compress.descLow.en: Highly compressed (60%-80% size reduction). Best for pure texts and receipts.

common.compress.descMedium.en: Balanced (40% size reduction). Preserves crisp font shapes and layout edges.

common.compress.descHigh.en: Preserves high color dynamics and photo resolutions with slight compression.

common.compress.descMaximum.en: Near 1:1 lossless optimization. Cleans debris and unused object chunks.

common.compress.clearMetadata.en: Strip author and editor metadata fully

common.compress.sizeInfo.en: Original: {size} MB • Cleaned obsolete fragments and metadata streams locally.

common.deepSanitize.uploadDescription.en: Drag & drop contracts, confidential files, or government records. Cleans PieceInfo and rebuilds cross-reference tables.

common.deepSanitize.clearXmp.en: Erase XMP XML metadata and document descriptions

common.deepSanitize.clearXmpDesc.en: Title, Author, Producer, and historical edit summary metadata

common.deepSanitize.clearPieceInfoDesc.en: Residual markup and edit records left by Adobe Acrobat/InDesign

common.deepSanitize.clearOcPropertiesDes.en: Often holds invisible dynamic watermarks used for leak tracking

common.deepSanitize.clearAnnotations.en: Wipe all interactive markups and links (Caution)

common.deepSanitize.clearAnnotationsDesc.en: Permanently deletes hyperlinks, comment boxes, and stroke annotations

common.deepSanitize.successDesc.en: Wiped all XMP metadata, edit records, PieceInfo, and optional visible content layers (OCG). The xref table was fully reconstructed.

common.einkOptimizer.afterSampleText.en: The philosophy of education is the study of the purpose, nature, and effects of education. Broadly defined, education is the process by which society transmits its accumulated knowledge...

common.einkOptimizer.beforeLabel.en: Original Scan: Dusty background with faint fonts

common.einkOptimizer.beforeSampleText.en: The philosophy of education is the study of the purpose, nature, and effects of education. Broadly defined, education is the process by which society transmits its accumulated knowledge...

common.formLogicDesigner.logicIntro1.en: Locate control nodes (e.g. checkbox) on the glassmorphic canvas.

common.formLogicDesigner.logicIntro2.en: Drag a connecting line from the dot to the target dependent field.

common.formLogicDesigner.logicIntro3.en: For checkboxes, this generates an active AcrobatJS validation script.

common.formLogicDesigner.logicIntro4.en: Purple light pulses on the connection line once successfully linked.

common.ocr.advantageDesc.en: The reconstructed searchable PDF embeds an invisible, perfectly aligned text layer above the scanned pixels. Keeps the original appearance while enabling full text highlighting, searching, and copying.

common.ocr.successSearchablePdf.en: Searchable PDF generated! The scanned sheets are overlaid with interactive text. Highlight and search freely.

common.ocr.successText.en: Plain text structures extracted successfully. Text preview displayed below.

common.overlayPdf.uploadBaseDesc.en: Serves as the structural background frame

common.overlayPdf.uploadLayerDesc.en: Stamp seals, structural trust margins, grids, or headers

common.overlayPdf.placementModeOverlay.en: Foreground (Overlay): Overlay layer is rendered on top of the base contents.

common.overlayPdf.placementModeUnderlay.en: Background (Underlay): Overlay layer is rendered beneath all base contents.

common.overlayPdf.targetRangeLabel.en: B. Target Page Range (Target Page Range)

common.overlayPdf.targetRangeHelp.en: Leave blank to apply to all base pages

common.overlayPdf.loopOverlayLabel.en: C. Loop Repeating (Loop Shorter Overlay Document)

common.overlayPdf.loopOverlayDesc.en: Loop-repeats the overlay document if it is shorter than the base document. If unchecked, remaining pages are left blank.

common.overlayPdf.successMessage.en: 🎉 PDF layers overlaid successfully! Click download above to save.

common.pageLabels.errorMetadata.en: Failed to parse PDF metadata. File might be corrupted.

common.pageLabels.errorUpload.en: Please upload a target PDF first.

common.pageLabels.pageRangeHelp.en: Leave blank to apply to all pages

common.pageLabels.successMessage.en: 🎉 PageLabels injected successfully! Open in a professional viewer to inspect the sidebar.

common.pageLabels.algorithmDesc.en: The badges below display computed label layouts. The colored badge next to each page index represents the layout visible in reader search fields.

common.pdfToCbz.errorMetadata.en: Failed to parse PDF comic metadata. File may be corrupted.

common.pdfToCbz.errorUpload.en: Please upload a comic PDF first.

common.pdfToCbz.uploadDesc.en: Renders pages at maximum details while embedding standard OPF / XML comic databases.

common.pdfToCbz.directionRtlHelp.en: Right to Left: Classic Manga scheme. Spines bind on the right side.

common.pdfToCbz.directionLtrHelp.en: Left to Right: Standard novel and comic book scheme. Spines bind on the left side.

common.pdfToCbz.seriesPlaceholder.en: e.g. One Piece, Attack on Titan

common.pdfToCbz.einkGreyscaleDesc.en: Desaturates pages to fast 16-level grayscale for e-paper refresh boosts.

common.pdfToCbz.successMessage.en: 🎉 Comic CBZ compiled successfully! metadata.opf and ComicInfo.xml injected. Download ready.

common.pdfToSlide.progressReconstructing.en: Analyzing semantic layers and reconstructing PPTX slides...

common.pdfToSlide.outlinePreviewDesc.en: Select a color theme and click generate to begin reconstructing slides.

common.pdfToTiff.errorMetadata.en: Failed to parse PDF metadata. File may be corrupted.

common.pdfToTiff.errorUpload.en: Please upload a target PDF first.

common.pdfToTiff.progressExtracting.en: Serializing pages to multi-page TIFF streams...

common.pdfToTiff.uploadDesc.en: Physical binary IFD compositor, stitching multiple high-fidelity pages directly into a single multi-page TIFF.

common.pdfToTiff.descColor.en: 24-bit RGB Color: 3 bytes per pixel. Preserves high-fidelity full color spectrum.

common.pdfToTiff.descGrayscale.en: 8-bit Grayscale: Converts colors to balanced luminances, ideal for scanning black-and-white archives.

common.pdfToTiff.descMono.en: 1-bit Monochromatic: Half-tone 127 binarization threshold, extreme contrast, shrinks file sizes by 24x.

common.pdfToTiff.tipDesc.en: Multi-page TIFF documents scroll smoothly in Photoshop or Acrobat, yet remain raster bitmapped. For text and vector lines, we recommend at least

common.pdfToTiff.successMessage.en: 🎉 Single-file multi-page TIFF compiled successfully! Download ready.

common.removeBlankPages.emptyState.en: No pages match the current filter

common.removeBlankPages.successRemoved.en: Successfully purged {count} blank page(s) and recompiled the PDF locally.

common.removeBlankPages.successNoChange.en: No blank pages were marked for removal. Exported directly.

common.rotate.optionsHelp.en: Select pages below and use the dials/slider to align or rotate pages.

common.rotate.inputTip.en: Angles will automatically normalize to [-180°, 180°] when blurred or submitted.

common.rotate.successMessage.en: 🎉 PDF pages rotated successfully! Click download above to save.

common.rotate.previewHelp.en: Click page thumbnail to select • Drag controllers to fine-tune alignments

common.timestamp.tsaDigicertDesc.en: DigiCert TSA Global PKI Cryptographic node

common.timestamp.tsaSectigoDesc.en: Sectigo TSA Comodo Atomic Clock Server

common.timestamp.uploadDescription.en: Drag & drop PDF here. Fully supports encrypted PDFs with automated local decryption.

common.timestamp.tsaPrivacyHelp.en: Only SHA-256 hashes are sent to the TSA servers. Full document privacy guaranteed.

common.timestamp.processingDesc.en: Uploading hash streams. Generating authoritative RFC 3161 timestamps.

common.vectorExtractor.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop PDFs with logos, diagrams, CAD drawings, or mathematical formulas. Rebuilds layers into high-fidelity SVGs.

common.vectorExtractor.emptyPropertiesDe.en: Click any vector path, character, or shape to extract the code.

toolsPage.subtitle.en: {count}+ free, secure, and easy-to-use tools for all your PDF needs.

tools.digitalSign.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file here, or click to browse.

tools.digitalSign.successMessage.en: PDF signed successfully! The signature can be verified in any PDF reader.

tools.digitalSign.errorFetch.en: Failed to fetch certificate chain. Check your internet connection and try again.

tools.digitalSign.errorImgType.en: Please select a PNG or JPEG image.

tools.validateSign.errorType.en: Please select a .pem, .crt, .cer, or .der certificate file.

tools.viewMetadata.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file here to view its metadata.

tools.viewMetadata.successMessage.en: Metadata extracted successfully! You can export it as JSON if needed.

tools.editMetadata.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file here to edit its metadata.

tools.editMetadata.successMessage.en: Metadata updated successfully! Click the download button to save your file.

tools.editPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file here, or click to browse.

tools.editPdf.saveError.en: Failed to save PDF. Please use the export button in the toolbar.

tools.editPdf.successMessage.en: PDF saved successfully! Click the download button to save your edited file.

tools.editPdf.redactWarningDescription.en: Select areas to permanently remove content. Redacted content cannot be recovered after saving.

tools.imageToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop images here, or click to browse. Supports JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, TIFF, SVG, HEIC.

tools.imageToPdf.successMessage.en: Images converted to PDF successfully! Click the download button to save your file.

tools.encryptPdf.successHint.en: Remember to save your passwords securely.

tools.alternateMerge.howItWorksDescripti.en: Pages are interleaved alternately: Page 1 from File 1, Page 1 from File 2, Page 2 from File 1, Page 2 from File 2, and so on. If documents have different page counts, extra pages are appended at the end.

tools.removeRestrictions.info.en: This tool removes owner password restrictions that prevent printing, copying, and editing. It works on PDFs with permission restrictions but cannot remove user passwords required to open the document.

faqPage.subtitle.en: Find answers to common questions about {brand}

faqPage.noResults.en: No FAQs found matching your search.

faqPage.sections.general.isFree.answer.en: Yes, PDFCraft is completely free to use. There are no hidden costs, no premium tiers, and no registration required. All features are available to everyone.

faqPage.sections.general.account.questio.en: Do I need to create an account?

faqPage.sections.general.account.answer.en: No, you don't need to create an account or register to use PDFCraft. Simply visit the website and start using any tool immediately.

faqPage.sections.privacy.uploaded.questi.en: Are my files uploaded to a server?

faqPage.sections.privacy.uploaded.answer.en: No, your files are never uploaded to any server. All PDF processing happens locally in your browser using JavaScript and WebAssembly. Your files never leave your device.

faqPage.sections.privacy.safe.question.en: Is it safe to use PDFCraft with sensitive documents?

faqPage.sections.privacy.safe.answer.en: Yes, PDFCraft is designed with privacy in mind. Since all processing happens locally in your browser, your sensitive documents remain on your device and are never transmitted over the internet.

faqPage.sections.privacy.storage.questio.en: What happens to my files after processing?

faqPage.sections.privacy.storage.answer.en: Your files are stored temporarily in your browser's memory during processing. Once you close the browser tab or navigate away, all file data is automatically cleared. We don't store any of your files.

faqPage.sections.features.operations.que.en: What PDF operations can I perform?

faqPage.sections.features.operations.ans.en: PDFCraft offers 67+ tools including: merge, split, compress, convert (to/from images, text, JSON), edit, annotate, sign, add watermarks, encrypt/decrypt, OCR, and many more.

faqPage.sections.features.merge.question.en: Can I merge multiple PDF files?

faqPage.sections.features.merge.answer.en: Yes, you can merge multiple PDF files into one. Simply use the Merge PDF tool, upload your files, arrange them in the desired order, and click merge.

faqPage.sections.features.images.questio.en: Can I convert images to PDF?

faqPage.sections.features.images.answer.en: Yes, PDFCraft supports converting various image formats (JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, TIFF, SVG, HEIC) to PDF. You can convert single or multiple images at once.

faqPage.sections.features.edit.question.en: Can I edit text in a PDF?

faqPage.sections.features.edit.answer.en: PDFCraft provides annotation and editing tools including highlighting, adding text, shapes, images, and signatures. For full text editing, the PDF Editor tool offers comprehensive annotation capabilities.

faqPage.sections.technical.browsers.answ.en: PDFCraft works on all modern browsers including Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. We recommend using the latest version of your browser for the best experience.

faqPage.sections.technical.sizeLimit.que.en: Is there a file size limit?

faqPage.sections.technical.sizeLimit.ans.en: Most tools support files up to 100MB, with some tools like merge and compress supporting up to 500MB. These limits are in place to ensure smooth performance in your browser.

faqPage.sections.technical.slow.question.en: Why is processing slow for large files?

faqPage.sections.technical.slow.answer.en: Since all processing happens in your browser, performance depends on your device's capabilities. Large files require more memory and processing power. For best results, close other browser tabs and applications.

faqPage.sections.technical.offline.answe.en: Currently, PDFCraft requires an internet connection to load the application. However, once loaded, the PDF processing itself happens locally and doesn't require a connection.

faqPage.sections.languages.supported.ans.en: PDFCraft is available in 9 languages: English, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, French, German, Chinese, Portuguese, and Arabic (with RTL support).

faqPage.sections.languages.change.questi.en: How do I change the language?

faqPage.sections.languages.change.answer.en: You can change the language using the language selector in the header. Your preference will be saved for future visits.

faqPage.cta.description.en: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Feel free to reach out to us.

aboutPage.description.en: {brand} is a free, privacy-focused PDF toolkit that runs entirely in your browser. With {count}+ professional tools, you can edit, convert, merge, split, and secure your PDF files without ever uploading them to a server.

aboutPage.mission.p1.en: We believe that everyone should have access to powerful PDF tools without compromising their privacy or paying expensive subscription fees. That's why we created {brand} – a comprehensive PDF toolkit that puts your privacy first.

aboutPage.mission.p2.en: Unlike traditional PDF services that require you to upload your files to remote servers, {brand} processes everything locally in your browser. Your sensitive documents never leave your device, giving you complete control over your data.

aboutPage.mission.p3.en: Whether you're a student, professional, or casual user, {brand} provides all the tools you need to work with PDFs efficiently and securely.

aboutPage.values.privacy.description.en: Your files never leave your device. All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring complete privacy and security.

aboutPage.values.fast.description.en: Powered by modern web technologies, PDFCraft delivers lightning-fast PDF processing without the need for uploads or downloads.

aboutPage.values.accessible.description.en: Available in 9 languages and works on any device with a modern browser. No installation required.

aboutPage.values.free.description.en: PDFCraft is completely free to use with no hidden costs, no registration required, and no limits on usage.

aboutPage.values.openSource.description.en: Built with transparency in mind. Our code is open source, allowing anyone to verify our privacy claims.

aboutPage.values.community.description.en: Developed with feedback from users around the world. We continuously improve based on your needs.

aboutPage.technology.description.en: {brand} is built using cutting-edge web technologies to ensure the best possible experience:

aboutPage.technology.list.indexeddb.en: <strong1>IndexedDB</strong1> - For secure local storage of your work

aboutPage.technology.summary.en: This combination of technologies allows us to provide professional-grade PDF tools that run entirely in your browser, without any server-side processing.

aboutPage.cta.description.en: Explore our {count}+ PDF tools and see what {brand} can do for you.
